title: STAR Incident - Enigma LLM Cost Spike Response
content:
Incident: Rapid increase in LLM inference spend

Situation:
- Inference costs scaled faster than planned as production usage increased.
- Unchecked spend threatened long-term sustainability of GenAI workflows.

Task:
- Reduce recurring inference costs while preserving acceptable output quality and SLA behavior.

Action:
- Introduced model-routing logic by task complexity.
- Added semantic caching to reduce repeated expensive calls.
- Shifted selected workflows toward fit-for-purpose models where quality remained acceptable.
- Instrumented cost and quality monitoring for ongoing control-loop tuning.

Result:
- Source material reports large cost reduction while maintaining delivery expectations.
- Incident converted into a stable cost-governance framework for LLM operations.
